judge_reason: Description A claims a red ink annotation and a dark blue hand-drawn 'X' mark, while Description B claims a red pencil 'X' on the left margin, a signature in the top right, and various handwritten stamps and numbers at the bottom, indicating contradictory claims about the location, color, and existence of specific visual elements.
original_image_tags: Handwritten annotation in red ink on right side of page, appears to be the number "8".
A large, dark blue, hand-drawn "X" mark crosses over the header "Office Memorandum".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typed FBI Office Memorandum page dated August 13, 1947, with handwritten notations and stamps, titled “FLYING DISC REPORTED AT HACKENSACK, NEW JERSEY AUGUST 3, 1947 – MISCELLANEOUS.”*
